channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Major U.S. banks pause data sharing with this federal bureau after a cyberattack exposed sensitive information
item.description: Several of the largest U.S. banks are reportedly pausing or reassessing how they send sensitive information to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) following a major cyberattack on the regulator.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Cato Networks augments CASB with genAI security
item.description: Cato Networks recently unveiled new generative AI capabilities in its Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB) that the secure access service edge (SASE) provider says will let enterprise IT organizations detect, analyze, and gain insights into the use of genAI applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FDA OKs trial of pig livers as dialysis-like treatment for liver failure
item.description: U.S. researchers are about to test if livers from gene-edited pigs could treat people with sudden liver failure — not with a transplant but temporarily attached outside the body.
item.dc:creator: Lauran Neergaard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sprinklr Announces New CIO Amid Company Transformation
item.description: Sprinklr, a unified customer experience management platform, appoints Sanjay Macwan as Chief Information Officer (CIO). Macwan will lead the company's global technology strategy, focusing on market positioning and technological leadership.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: China pursuing 3 alleged US operatives over cyberattacks during Asian Games
item.description: China says it is pursuing three alleged U.S. operatives accused of carrying out cyberattacks on Chinese infrastructure during the Asian Winter Games.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Bodeen, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OpenAI launches new GPT-4.1 models with improved coding
item.description: OpenAI on Monday launched its new AI model GPT-4.1, along with smaller versions GPT-4.1 mini and GPT-4.1 nano, touting major improvements in coding, instruction following, and long context comprehension.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand in historic antitrust trial
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg took to the witness stand on the first day of a historic antitrust trial to defend his company against allegations it illegally monopolized the social media market.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Radeon RX 9060 XT GPU Leaked: Performance, Pricing, and More - Tech Update
item.description: AMD's Radeon RX 9060 XT GPU is making waves with its potential performance and pricing. Find out what you need to know about this new leak.
item.dc:creator: christian.guyton@futurenet.com (Christian Guyton), TechRadar

item.title: Intel sells majority stake in Altera to Silver Lake investors in a deal valued at $8.75 billion
item.description: Intel announced Monday that it was selling the majority of its Altera chip business to technology investor Silver Lake in a deal valued at $8.75 billion.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta says it will resume AI training with public content from European users
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Social media company Meta said Monday that it will start using publicly available content from European users to train its artificial intelligence models, resuming work put on hold last year after activists raised concerns about data privacy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vendors vote to radically slash website certificate duration
item.description: In a move that will likely force IT to much more aggressively use web certificate automation services, the Certification Authority Browser Forum (CA/Browser Forum), a gathering of certificate issuers and suppliers of applications that use certificates, voted Friday to radically slash the lifespan of
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Groundcover grows funding for eBPF-based observability tech
item.description: When Groundcover entered the observability market in 2021, it was already a mature market with established vendors.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hackers breach Morocco's social security database in an unprecedented cyberattack
item.description: RABAT, Morocco (AP) — Morocco 's social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: SAM METZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Infoblox, Google Cloud partner to protect hybrid and multicloud enterprise resources
item.description: Infoblox and Google Cloud announced a partnership that powers new products from each company that they say will help enterprise organizations accelerate their cloud adoption with advanced networking and security capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: One Tech Tip: Locking down your device when crossing borders
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Planning an international trip? Travelers should prepare for the possibility of extra scrutiny of their phones when crossing borders, especially when entering the United States. The Canadian government warned travelers in a recent travel advisory that U.S.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DSPy: An open-source framework for LLM-powered applications
item.description: The past year has seen explosive growth in generative AI and the tools for integrating generative AI models into applications. Developers are eager to harness large language models (LLMs) to build smarter applications, but doing so effectively remains challenging.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GitHub Advanced Security now offers security campaigns
item.description: GitHub has made security campaigns available for GitHub Advanced Security and GitHub Code Security users. Security campaigns help control security debt and manage risk by enabling collaboration between developers and security teams, GitHub said.
item.dc:creator: Info World
